title: Archaeology of the Silk Roads
organisation: The Institute for Translation and Interpreting
further_info: This course is offered by the Università degli Studi di Milano as part of 4EU+. Contact studienkoordination@iued.uni-heidelberg.de if you have any questions. Dieser Kurs wird von der Università degli Studi di Milano im Rahmen von 4EU+ angeboten. Bitte kontaktieren Sie bei Fragen studienkoordination@iued.uni-heidelberg.de. This course will take place during the summer semester from Feb 2026 to June 2026 Der Kurs findet im Sommersemester vom Feb 2026 bis June 2026 statt. Lecturer: Luca Olivieri (luca.olivieri@unimi.it) Further Information: https://sp.4euplus.eu/courses/db3e4139-4bd4-486e-a4c6-a2d256dd20a1
